title: arenaria pauciflora
intro: Arenaria pauciflora, commonly known as the alpine sandwort, is a low-growing, perennial herb with small white flowers and edible roots. The medicinal properties of Arenaria pauciflora include its diuretic and expectorant effects, making it useful for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of consuming the plant's roots include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. Arenaria pauciflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support respiratory health.
